query: SELECT c.id, c.customerId, c.humanMode, c.humanModeUntil, cu.phone, cu.whatsappId FROM conversations c JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id WHERE c.humanMode = true OR c.humanModeUntil IS NOT NULL;
